# OpenlineageEmitterComponent

Asset check that emits OpenLineage START/COMPLETE events to OL-compatible backends (Marquez, DataHub, OpenMetadata) when an upstream asset materializes.

## Dependencies
- `pandas`
- `requests`

## See also
- [Schema](schema.json) · [Example](example.yaml)

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `check_name` | `str` | Asset check name |
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | Asset whose materialization triggers an OL event |
| `openlineage_url` | `str` | OL backend endpoint (e.g. 'https://marquez.acme.com/api/v1/lineage') |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `timeout_seconds` | `int` | `30` | — |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `description` | `str` | — | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `auth_token_env` | `str` | — | Env var with bearer token (omit for unauthenticated) |
| `namespace` | `str` | `"dagster"` | OL namespace for the asset |
| `producer_url` | `str` | `"https://github.com/eric-thomas-dagster/dagster-component-templates"` | `producer` URL field on the event (identifies the emitter) |
| `job_namespace` | `str` | — | Override job namespace (defaults to `namespace`) |
| `job_name_override` | `str` | — | Override OL job name (default: derived from asset) |
| `schema_facet` | `bool` | `true` | Include the schema facet inferred from DataFrame columns |
| `column_lineage_facet` | `dict` | — | Optional column-lineage map: {output_col: [input_col, ...]} → emitted as the columnLineage facet |
| `upstream_input_assets` | `list[str]` | — | Asset keys to declare as `inputs` on the OL job (None = no inputs declared) |
| `blocking` | `bool` | `false` | Block downstream when emit fails |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->
